summary: Specified the Site Registry relation capability verifier contract before Worker/D1 auth changes. Added a versioned product artifact that separates relation current state, transition admission, capability grants, credential refs, private verifier records, and enrollment evidence; defines first-verifier bootstrap and v0 unsupported paths; and spells out raw-secret, replay, rotation, revocation, and cross-Site refusal posture. Added four JSON fixtures for verifier record, enrollment event, withdrawal request, and cross-Site refusal.
residuals: No D1 migration, Worker route/auth change, Cloudflare secret setting, or live verifier enrollment was implemented in this task.
Signed Site envelope support remains future posture only.
Registry-owner/admin suppression credentials remain out of scope for this slice.
